faqs: How do I create a free UPI QR code for my shop?
Enter your UPI ID, optionally add business name or amount, generate the QR code, test it with Google Pay, PhonePe or Paytm, then download and print it.
Does a UPI QR code expire?
A static UPI QR code normally does not expire as long as the UPI ID remains active.
Can customers pay with Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm and BHIM?
Yes. A valid UPI QR code can be scanned by common UPI apps such as Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM and many banking apps.
Can I print a UPI QR code for my billing counter?
Yes. Download the PNG, test scan it, then print it clearly for your shop counter, receipt desk, table tent or standee.
Is merchant name compulsory for UPI QR code?
No. On BharathQR, merchant or business name is optional. The UPI ID is the required payment identifier.
How do I verify a UPI payment was received?
Check the payment confirmation inside your UPI app or bank app, not only the customer screenshot.
Can kirana stores use this free UPI QR code?
Yes. Kirana stores, tea stalls, salons, clinics, restaurants and small shops can use a static UPI QR code for faster cashless payments.
Can I create a fixed amount UPI QR code?
Yes. Add an optional amount before generating the QR code if you want customers to pay a fixed value.
Can I use the QR code on WhatsApp or Instagram?
Yes. You can share the downloaded QR image on WhatsApp Business, Instagram posts, posters or digital invoices.
Is BharathQR an official bank or NPCI service?
No. BharathQR is an independent free QR tool platform and does not represent NPCI, any bank or payment app.
How do I create a Google Review QR code?
Copy your Google Business Profile review link, paste it into the BharathQR Google Review QR Generator, generate, download and print the QR code.
Where should restaurants place a Google Review QR code?
Restaurants can place review QR codes on bills, tables, takeaway packets, menu cards, reception counters and table tents.
Can hotels use a Google Review QR code at checkout?
Yes. Hotels can display the QR code at reception, room folders, breakfast areas and checkout counters to collect more Google reviews.
Does a Google Review QR code improve Google Maps visibility?
More genuine customer reviews can support trust and local visibility, but no QR tool can guarantee Google Maps ranking.
Can clinics and salons use review QR codes?
Yes. Clinics, dentists, salons and local service businesses can use review QR codes to make customer feedback easier.
Is it okay to ask every customer for a Google review?
You can ask customers politely, but reviews should be genuine and must follow Google review policies.
Can I print a review QR code on a poster?
Yes. Print it with a clear call-to-action such as Scan to review us on Google.
What if my Google review link changes?
For static QR codes, generate and print a new QR code if the destination link changes.
How do I create a WhatsApp QR code for business?
Enter your WhatsApp number with country code, add an optional message, generate the QR code and place it on your card, poster, shop counter or packaging.
What is the difference between WhatsApp QR and WhatsApp link?
A WhatsApp link is clicked online, while a WhatsApp QR code is scanned from print materials, shop counters, business cards and posters.
Can restaurants use WhatsApp QR for orders?
Yes. Restaurants and cafes can let customers scan and open a WhatsApp chat for orders, enquiries or table booking.
Can I use WhatsApp Business with this QR?
Yes. Use your WhatsApp Business number to create a QR code that opens a chat with your business.
Can I add a pre-filled WhatsApp message?
Yes. A pre-filled message helps customers start with text like I want to order or I need more details.
Where should I place WhatsApp QR code?
Use it on business cards, store posters, bills, packaging, brochures, Instagram stories and product labels.
Does the customer need to save my number first?
No. The QR code can open WhatsApp chat directly without manually saving the number.
Is WhatsApp QR useful for salons and clinics?
Yes. Salons, clinics, tutors and freelancers can use it for appointments, enquiries and follow-ups.
How does a WiFi QR code work?
A WiFi QR code stores the network name and password so guests can scan and connect without typing.
Can hotels use WiFi QR codes?
Yes. Hotels can place WiFi QR codes at reception, rooms, restaurants and conference halls.
Can cafes and restaurants share WiFi using QR code?
Yes. A cafe or restaurant can print a WiFi QR code for tables, counters or menu stands.
Is it safe to print my WiFi password as QR code?
Only display guest network credentials. Avoid sharing private office or admin network passwords.
Which phones can scan WiFi QR codes?
Most modern Android and iPhone cameras can scan WiFi QR codes directly.
Can I create WiFi QR without login?
Yes. BharathQR lets you generate WiFi QR codes without login or account creation.
What if my WiFi password changes?
Generate and print a new QR code after changing the password.
Where should I print WiFi QR code?
Use reception desks, room folders, cafe tables, co-working spaces and event check-in desks.
How do I create a QR code for a website link?
Paste a valid https:// URL, generate the QR code, test it and download the PNG.
Can I create a QR code for Google Forms?
Yes. Paste your Google Form link to create a QR code for surveys, registrations or feedback.
Can I use URL QR on brochures and posters?
Yes. URL QR codes are useful on brochures, posters, flyers, packaging, business cards and shop counters.
Can I change the link later?
Static QR codes cannot be edited after printing. Generate a new QR code if the link changes.
Is URL QR useful for real estate?
Yes. Real estate agents can link to property pages, Google Maps locations, WhatsApp enquiry pages or brochures.
What is a text QR code?
A text QR code stores plain text such as instructions, coupon codes, short notes or event information.
Can text QR work without internet?
Yes. Since the text is stored inside the QR code, scanning can show the text without opening a website.
Where can I use text QR codes?
Use text QR codes on product labels, classroom notices, event signs, coupons and instructions.
Can I add offers in a text QR?
Yes. You can store coupon text or offer instructions in the QR code.
Is text QR good for small shops?
Yes. Shops can print payment notes, offer codes or customer instructions as a simple QR code.
What is a vCard QR code?
A vCard QR code lets people scan and save your contact details quickly.
Who should use vCard QR codes?
Real estate agents, doctors, freelancers, consultants, tutors and small business owners can use vCard QR codes.
Can I print vCard QR on a business card?
Yes. vCard QR codes are ideal for visiting cards, brochures, flyers, posters and email signatures.
Does a vCard QR need internet?
Saving contact details may work without opening a website because the contact information is inside the QR code.
What details can I include?
You can include name, phone, email, company and website depending on the tool fields.
How do I create a menu QR code for a restaurant?
Paste your digital menu link, generate a menu QR code, download and print it for tables or counters.
Can hotels use menu QR codes?
Yes. Hotels can use menu QR codes in rooms, restaurants, cafes and room-service cards.
Can a menu QR reduce printing cost?
Yes. If your menu link stays updated, you can avoid frequent reprinting of physical menus.
Where should I place a menu QR code?
Use tables, table tents, takeaway packets, reception desks, posters and packaging.
Is menu QR useful for cafes?
Yes. Cafes can place menu QR codes near counters, tables and outdoor boards.
